name: Sloppy Joe Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 large Italian bread shell or prepared pizza crust, 12 inches
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large nonstick skillet, brown ground beef over medium heat for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until no longer pink.
3. Remove and discard the drippings.
4. Stir in corn, Head Country Bar-B-Q Sauce, green onions, and Head Country All-Purpose Seasoning. Heat through.
5. Place bread shell on a baking sheet. Evenly distribute the beef mixture and sprinkle with cheese.
6. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until the cheese is melted. Cut into 8 wedges. Makes 8 servings.
